sources.text: silt collapse struck the Glass Choir ochre north quay sector. Glass Choir has posted two response lanes with different standing requirements. Check your current state before committing.

public_requirements.label: Glass Choir standing 16+ unlocks glass curtain; successful use spends 2 standing.
Debt 46 or lower preserves trusted response access.
Aura 22+ unlocks safe exploitation; successful use spends 12 aura.
Debt 28 or lower keeps the exploit lane viable.

rules.label: Glass Choir trusted you to run the glass curtain protocol and contain the spill cleanly.
You reached for faction cover without enough standing to clear the lane.
You exploited the disruption for value, burning readiness to do it.
You lunged for upside without enough visible margin to survive the blast.
The interrupt rolled through while you hesitated.

sources.text: archive firebreak struck the Civic Ward saffron salt flat sector. Civic Ward has posted two response lanes with different standing requirements. Check your current state before committing.

Debt 30 or lower keeps the exploit lane viable.
